title: scariola triquetra
intro: Scariola triquetra, also known as salsify or goat's beard, is a biennial plant that belongs to the sunflower family and is native to Europe and Asia. The medicinal properties of Scariola triquetra include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, improve digestion, and support the immune system. Scariola triquetra can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and it is often used in herbal medicine to treat various ailments.
